"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import { Calendar, CheckCircle2, AlertCircle, PieChart, Activity, FileCheck, CheckSquare, Target } from "lucide-react"; export default function AssessmentsPage() { return (
{/* Header */}

Academic Assessments

Track your CAT schedules, internal calculations, and attendance metrics.

{/* Horizontal Grid Layout */}
{/* Column 1: Attendance & Schedule */}
{/* Attendance Percentage So Far */}

Overall Attendance

Target: 85% to attend Placements.

88%
Safe Zone
{/* CAT Schedule */}

Upcoming CAT Schedule

{[ { subject: "Advanced Data Structures", date: "Nov 12, 2026", time: "09:30 AM", type: "CAT 2" }, { subject: "Machine Learning Concepts", date: "Nov 14, 2026", time: "01:30 PM", type: "CAT 2" }, { subject: "Database Systems", date: "Nov 16, 2026", time: "09:30 AM", type: "CAT 2" } ].map((exam, i) => (
{exam.subject}
{exam.date} {exam.time}
{exam.type}
))}
{/* Column 2: Marks & Internals */}
{/* Previous CAT Marks */}

Previous CAT 1 Performance

{[ { subject: "Advanced Data Structures", total: 50, scored: 45 }, { subject: "Machine Learning Concepts", total: 50, scored: 38 }, { subject: "Database Systems", total: 50, scored: 42 } ].map((res, i) => (
{res.subject} {res.scored} / {res.total}
0.8 ? "#22c55e" : "var(--accent)" }} />
))}
{/* Internals Calculations */}

Internals Calculation (Out of 40)

Projected internal scores based on CAT 1, given assignments, and attendance baseline.

{[ { subject: "Adv DS", cat1: 15, assign: 10, atten: 5, total: 30 }, { subject: "ML Concepts", cat1: 12, assign: 8, atten: 5, total: 25 }, ].map((proj, i) => (

{proj.subject}

CAT 1 {proj.cat1}/15
Assign {proj.assign}/10
Atten {proj.atten}/5
Total {proj.total}/30
))}
* Remaining 10 points are allocated to CAT 2 exams.
); }

"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import { User, Calendar, CheckSquare, MessagesSquare, FileText, CheckCircle2 } from "lucide-react"; export default function MentorPage() { return (
{/* Header */}

Mentor Guide

Monthly review schedules, verified faculty feedbacks, and actionable suggestions.

{/* Horizontal Grid Layout */}
{/* Column 1: Mentor Profile & Schedule */}
{/* Faculty Profile */}

Dr. S. K. Mahapatra

Associate Professor - CS Dept

{/* Upcoming Counseling Slot */}

Next Scheduled Counseling

Post-CAT 2 Review
Nov 20, 2026 11:00 AM

* Student must present their GitHub repository updates and CAT 2 marks.

{/* Column 2: Feedback & Counseling Records */}

Counseling Records & Feedback

{/* Record 1 */}
Post-CAT 1 Assessment Review
Conducted on: Oct 15, 2026
Verified by Faculty
Faculty Feedback:

"Excellent internal scores so far. However, your coding streak has dropped. I suggest completing 3 Graph Data Structure problems before next review. Also, attend the upcoming Tech Talk."

Assigned Tasks:
Solve 3 LeetCode Graph Problems Pending
Register for Google Cloud Workshop Completed
{/* Record 2 */}
Semester Orientation
Conducted on: Aug 05, 2026
Verified by Faculty
Faculty Feedback:

"Goals are set clearly. Prioritize AWS Cloud practitioner by December."

); }

})}

"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import Image from "next/image"; import { roadmapData } from "@/lib/data"; import { Crosshair, Award, Map as MapIcon, Video, Link as LinkIcon, BriefcaseIcon, GraduationCap, CheckCircle, PlayCircle } from "lucide-react"; import mascotImg from "@/assets/mascot.png"; import trophyImg from "@/assets/trophy.png"; import thumbImg from "@/assets/thumb.png"; export default function RoadmapPage() { return (
{/* Encouragement Banner with Mascot */}

"You're on fire! 2 Goals achieved this month."

Keep pushing. Earning the AWS Certification next will unlock your Elite Cloud Badge.

{/* Header */}

Goals & Roadmap

Your centralized hub for year goals, certifications, clubs, and placement training.

{/* Grid Layout */}
{/* Goals Tracking */}

This Year's Goals

{[ { title: "Complete 2 Core ML Projects", done: true }, { title: "Maintain > 8.5 CGPA", done: true }, { title: "Publish 1 Research Paper", done: false }, { title: "Land Summer Internship", done: false }, ].map((goal, i) => (
{goal.done && }
{goal.title}
))}
{/* Certifications Earned with Trophies */}

Elite Certifications

{[ { name: "AWS Cloud Practitioner", issuer: "Amazon Web Services", date: "Aug 2025" }, { name: "Deep Learning Specialization", issuer: "Coursera", date: "May 2025" }, ].map((cert, i) => (
{cert.name}
{cert.issuer} {cert.date}
))}
{/* Extracurriculars & Clubs */}

Clubs & Extracurriculars

AI Club - Core Committee

Organized 3 workshops, managing a team of 15 members.

Google Developer Student Clubs (GDSC)

Technical Lead - Mentoring junior students in Python & ML.

{/* Right Column: Training & Mentor */}
{/* Embedded Interactive Video Series */}

Placement Sandbox

Required
Google Mock Interview
Data Structures ΓÇó 45m
Behavioral Rounds Explained
HR Prep ΓÇó 20m

Mentor Task Queue

System Design Basics integration Done
Improving GitHub documentation In Progress
{/* Industry Updates & Free Certs */}

Recommended Reading

Hot Content
"How I cracked my FAANG Interview"
Medium ΓÇó By Ex-Amazon Engineer
Active Scholarships
Google Generation Scholarship
Ends next week. $10,000 award for selected candidates.
); }

messages.message: 'prevProbability' is assigned a value but never used.
'mascotMood' is assigned a value but never used.
'mascotMsg' is assigned a value but never used.

React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'animatedProbability', 'celebrationShown', 'computeProbability', and 'probability'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. You can also replace multiple useState variables with useReducer if 'setPrevProbability' needs the current value of 'probability'.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [animatedProbability, celebrationShown, computeProbability, probability, values]

fix.text: [animatedProbability, celebrationShown, computeProbability, probability, values]

'mascotMsg' is assigned a value but never used.

'MASCOT_CONFIG' is assigned a value but never used.
'verifying' is assigned a value but never used.
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'STEPS.length'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [STEPS.length, stepIdx]

fix.text: [STEPS.length, stepIdx]
